eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Adams; Arapahoe; Broomfield; Denver; Jefferson, CO; at 06:29 PM ON FEB 13, 2026 Effective until 09:29 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Colorado Bureau of Investigation with and AMBER Child Abduction Alert. We have received this important announcement regarding an abducted Child  from Commerce City The Commerce City Police Department is searching for 4 year old Sean Chavez last seen on February 13 , 2026 at about four pm this evening. Sean is described as a white, male, green eyes and blonde hair. Sean was last seen wearing a grey jacket, green t-shirt with dinosaurs, and blue jeans. investigators believe Sean may have been taken by forty five year old, white, male, Jeremy Chavez, brown hair and blue eyes and may be traveling in a stolen 2024 black chevy silverado with texas license plate 8  1  7  X  9  7  0 that was last seen at 109th and Dahlia in Commerce City at approximately 6:20pm. If you have any information regarding this abduction, immediately call 9 1  1.
